activeGoal: 基于 Requirement ELM-REQ-OPENCODE-UX，对 Sidepanel 会话界面进行深度 UI/UX 架构重构，以实现 OpenCode Web 级别的丝滑流式体验；重点覆盖组件级读写隔离、Markdown 增量异步渲
designSummary: Narrow rework refinement for Requirement ELM-REQ-OPENCODE-UX after QA/Audit failure on commit 8193af5339ca00cbedc536c12171d5979a82e5ee. Preserve existing sidepanel UX architecture and retry history for TASK-018 through TASK-022. Limit follow-up work to adding scanner-verifiable automated test requirement trace tags in existing executed sidepanel regression tests under extension/src/sidepanel, specifically reasoningTimeline.test.ts, reasoningTimelineView.test.tsx, and reasoningTimeline.chromeSandbox.test.tsx, then rerun QA/Audit so verifiedIntentIds includes ELM-REQ-OPENCODE-UX.
designDecisions: SystemArchitect completed brownfield analysis and proposed software-unit decomposition refining planning seed TASK-017 into review-only proposed tasks TASK-017-01 through TASK-017-05. Human approval is required before dispatching Implementation.
Human reviewer replied 同意. Implementation dispatch is now authorized for architect-defined tasks TASK-017-01 through TASK-017-05 under the approved full-model requirement ELM-REQ-OPENCODE-UX.

ModelUpdated: Rework batch for TASK-018,TASK-019,TASK-020,TASK-021,TASK-022 is a narrow verification-contract refinement only. No UX redesign or sidepanel scope expansion is authorized. Existing ownership boundary remains extension/src/sidepanel. Refined implementation contract requires explicit scanner-verifiable requirement tagging for ELM-REQ-OPENCODE-UX in executed automated regression tests: extension/src/sidepanel/reasoningTimeline.test.ts for transcript projection coverage, extension/src/sidepanel/reasoningTimelineView.test.tsx for historical/live rendering and presentation coverage, and extension/src/sidepanel/reasoningTimeline.chromeSandbox.test.tsx for mixed-order streaming boundary coverage. Preferred exact marker is // @RequirementID: ELM-REQ-OPENCODE-UX placed at test-file or primary describe-block level; existing architecture tags should be retained. Validation evidence after rework must show executed tagged tests plus run_reality_scanner verifiedIntentIds containing ELM-REQ-OPENCODE-UX, enabling QA and Audit to pass without unrelated code changes.
